name: Tranquility
description: Freedom from disturbance or inner turmoil.

name: Discipline
description: Capacity to act with consistency and restraint.

name: Meaning
description: Sense of significance, direction, or purpose.

name: Attachment
description: Emotional bond and its behavioral consequences.

name: Habit
description: Repeated pattern of behavior shaped by cues and reinforcement.

name: Wealth
description: Material resources and the behaviors surrounding them.
